items.title: Lenskart Q3 Results: Cons profit skyrockets 6,983% YoY to Rs 131 crore, revenue jumps 38%
items.description: Lenskart Solutions witnessed a remarkable surge in its net profit, climbing by 6,982% to Rs 131 crore in the December-ended quarter. This substantial growth was accompanied by a 38% increase in revenue from operations, reaching Rs 2,308 crore during the same period.

items.title: Ashok Leyland Q3 Results: Cons PAT rises 4% YoY to Rs 796 crore, revenue jumps 22%
items.description: Ashok Leyland reported a 4.5% year-on-year rise in Q3 net profit to Rs 796 crore despite a one-time Rs 308 crore charge. Revenue surged 22% to Rs 11,534 crore, with record third-quarter EBITDA, higher volumes across segments, market share gains and strong cash position.

items.title: M&M Q3 Results: Standalone PAT jumps 33% to Rs 3,931 crore; consolidated revenue crosses Rs 50,000 crore
items.description: M&M Q3 Results: Mahindra & Mahindra announced strong third-quarter results for FY26. Net profit surged 33% to Rs 3,931 crore. Revenue from operations grew 26% to Rs 38,942 crore. The automobile and farm sectors showed robust growth. Services businesses also contributed significantly to the improved performance. M&M shares saw an uptick following the announcement.
